name: Lightspeed Commerce Inc.
description: Lightspeed Commerce Inc. is a leading provider of cloud-based point-of-sale, payments, and e-commerce software solutions designed for retail, hospitality, and golf businesses. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in Montreal, Canada, the company empowers merchants in over 100 countries to streamline operations, manage inventory, and deliver exceptional customer experiences. By integrating advanced technology, data-driven insights, and robust payment processing, Lightspeed helps businesses of all sizes—from local shops to large enterprises—scale sustainably and thrive in an increasingly digital marketplace.
